cubes.name: cfm_vn_active_daily
cubes.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day)
cubes.description: One row per user per active day. Use this cube whenever you need a time window NOT pre-computed in mf_users (mf_users has rolling 30d only), OR to retrieve a user's day-by-day activity timeline for the 360 view. For best 1-user latency, ALWAYS pass a user_id equality filter.

measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Rows

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.dau
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Dau

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.dau_exact
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Dau Exact

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.paying_dau
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Paying Dau
measures.description: Distinct active users with at least one recharge day in the selected window. Payer share / recharge rate = paying_dau / dau. Prefer this over grouping dau by is_recharge_day for multi-day windows — that split double-counts users who paid on some days but not others.

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.mau
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Mau
measures.description: Monthly active users — query with time_dimension granularity=month

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.mau_prev_month
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Mau Prev Month
measures.description: Distinct users with at least one active day in the previous calendar month

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.wau
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Wau
measures.description: Weekly active users — unique users active in the ISO week (Mon-Sun); query with time_dimension granularity=week

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.trailing_wau
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Trailing Wau
measures.description: Trailing WAU — distinct active users from the start of the current ISO week (Monday) through today

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.trailing_mau
measures.title: CFM VN — Daily Active Snapshots (per user, per day) Trailing Mau
measures.description: Trailing MAU — distinct active users from the start of the current calendar month through today

measures.name: cfm_vn_active_daily.avg_online_time_min_per_dau
